commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a fresh session-store reread before final delivery gives up on a no-send route, updates delivery tests, re-exports `loadSessionStore` for the command runtime, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is present for the exact reported Discord/progress failure. Source inspection and the PR's mocked regression do show the no-target stale-route boundary that the patch is trying to fix.
commands.review_followup: Needs human PR handling because a protected maintainer-labeled delivery PR has a P1 same-session routing blocker and missing contributor real-behavior proof; this is not a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: Harden final delivery routing refresh
target.body:
Summary:
- Refresh session delivery routing once before final delivery fails with a no-send routing outcome.
- Keep the existing durable send path as the only place that actually sends final payloads, so the refresh cannot duplicate platform sends.
- Add a focused regression covering stale session routing followed by fresh delivery context.

Verification:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/command/delivery.test.ts`
- Testbox-through-Crabbox `tbx_01kryv56rw77vtk5cczvapkca2`: `pnpm check:changed`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

Related:
- Refs #83744.
- Related to #49055.

Real behavior proof:
- Behavior addressed: final delivery can fail before any platform send is attempted when routing is resolved from stale session state.
- Real environment tested: Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox (`tbx_01kryv56rw77vtk5cczvapkca2`) for changed gates; AWS Crabbox/Discord investigation reproduced related progress-failure timing but did not reproduce #83744 exactly.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/command/delivery.test.ts`; `pnpm check:changed` on Testbox-through-Crabbox.
- Evidence after fix: the regression sends exactly once after fresh session routing supplies the delivery target; changed gate passed on Testbox.
- Observed result after fix: stale/no-target routing no longer causes an immediate no-send final delivery failure when fresh session state has a valid target.
- What was not tested: a clean live artifact showing #83744's exact stale Discord failed-progress surface suppressing a later successful final reply was not captured.
target.author: joshavant
